title: No dependency manifest (requirements.txt / pyproject.toml)
evidence: no requirements.txt or pyproject.toml in run_dir; server.py:4 imports mcp, data_loader.py:3 imports pandas, test_*.py import pytest — none declared
suggestion: Add requirements.txt pinning mcp, pandas, pytest so the server is reproducible outside the scoring sandbox

title: Lint score below clean (ruff code_quality=0.667)
suggestion: Run ruff and resolve the flagged style/lint issues

title: Module-level lru_cache(maxsize=1) on _get_loader keys only on data_dir
evidence: server.py:47-49 — _get_loader caches by data_dir; first call wins for the process, fine for the single-dataset server but couples all tools to one global DataLoader
suggestion: Acceptable for this server; note that tests pass data_dir explicitly so cache collisions are avoided

title: Tools beyond the spec (top_rated_players, biggest_wins, season_summary, players_at_brazilian_clubs, team_statistics)
evidence: server.py:401,436,452,463,356 — additional MCP tools enriching the required capability set
suggestion: None — surfaced as enhancement, not a deduction
